message.content:
In /Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/public-pages, search for how "request-mocking-protocol" (RMP) is integrated. Specifically find:

1. Any MSW (mock service worker) setup files - handler files, worker setup, server setup
2. Any middleware or plugin that initializes RMP on the server side
3. Any references to "VITE_ENABLE_RMP" in source code (not just env files)
4. Any references to "request-mocking-protocol" in source code beyond the test file
5. Check package.json for msw and request-mocking-protocol dependencies
6. Any entry point or bootstrap file that conditionally enables mocking

Be thorough - check src/, tests/, and any config files.

content.text: I'll conduct a thorough search for how request-mocking-protocol (RMP) is integrated in this codebase. Let me start with multiple parallel searches to cover all the areas you mentioned.
